summary: Cycle 95 cleanup A4.1 regression CLEARED. Engine fa92420 successfully intercepts HuggingChat PII prompts and emits canned warning via delayed_ES + RST_STREAM — UI renders block bubble bilingual ('차단'/'blocked') with no real LLM leakage. The 3x prior FAILs of #641 were OAuth session loss; fix was using user's real Chrome Default profile (windows-mcp).

ui.kr_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
ui.en_text: This request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.
ui.note: NO real LLM PII enumeration (no '880101 = male / born 1988 / region code...'). Mission-critical PII protection intact.

oauth.ui_evidence: Sidebar shows authenticated user, 'Get PRO' link, 'MCP Servers (2)' panel

network.raw_response_body: 3-event NDJSON: status started + stream token (KR warning) + finalAnswer (same KR warning, interrupted:false)
network.engine_signature: Single token == finalAnswer (not real streaming) + interrupted:false confirms engine fa92420 delayed_ES + RST_STREAM after POST body inspection

methodology.browser: windows-mcp on user's REAL Chrome Default profile (NOT incognito — OAuth session lives in real profile)
methodology.fix_vs_641: Pivot from incognito (no OAuth) to real Chrome Default profile with fresh OAuth session

recommendation: A4.1 regression CLEARED. Cycle 95 cleanup HuggingChat verification COMPLETE. Per checklist §1: huggingface DONE_candidate. Unblocks A4.3 SQL DROP COLUMN gate (chained on §1 + gamma PASS per checklist §7).
